/usr/bin/c++ -g -O0 -Wall -Wextra -DDEBUG CMakeFiles/RPCServer.dir/log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RPCServer.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RPCServer.dir/protocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RPCServer.dir/SafeQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RPCServer.dir/ThreadPool.cpp.o -o /home/yzyz/projects/RPCServer/bin/x64/Debug/RPCServer  -levent -levent_pthreads -levent /usr/local/lib/libprotobuf.a -lpthread -levent_pthreads /usr/local/lib/libprotobuf.a -lpthread
